datasets.name: ds_p2_accuracy
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) AS score_pct, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failures, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) >= 99 THEN 'On Track' WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS score_band FROM workspace.meta.data_quality_checks WHERE check_category IN ('validity', 'integrity', 'referential') AND event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd')

datasets.name: ds_p3_completeness
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) AS score_pct, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failures, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) >= 99 THEN 'On Track' WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS score_band FROM workspace.meta.data_quality_checks WHERE check_category = 'completeness' AND event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd')

datasets.name: ds_p4_timeliness
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN run_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0) AS score_pct, COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS total_runs, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN run_status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_runs, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN run_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0) >= 99 THEN 'On Track' WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN run_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0) >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS score_band FROM workspace.meta.pipeline_runs WHERE event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd')

datasets.name: ds_p6_lineage
queryLines: WITH pipeline AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS total_runs FROM workspace.meta.pipeline_runs WHERE event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd')), lineage AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS runs_with_lineage, COUNT(*) AS total_hops, COUNT(DISTINCT step) AS steps_covered, COUNT(DISTINCT dataset_id) AS datasets_covered FROM workspace.meta.data_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) SELECT COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) AS runs_with_lineage, COALESCE(pipeline.total_runs, 0) AS total_runs, COALESCE(pipeline.total_runs, 0) - COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) AS missing_runs, CASE WHEN COALESCE(pipeline.total_runs, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) / pipeline.total_runs, 1) END AS coverage_pct, COALESCE(lineage.total_hops, 0) AS total_hops, COALESCE(lineage.steps_covered, 0) AS steps_covered, COALESCE(lineage.datasets_covered, 0) AS datasets_covered, CASE WHEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(pipeline.total_runs, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) / pipeline.total_runs, 1) END >= 99 THEN 'On Track' WHEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(pipeline.total_runs, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) / pipeline.total_runs, 1) END >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS coverage_band FROM pipeline CROSS JOIN lineage

datasets.name: ds_p2_accuracy_trend
queryLines: WITH band_domain AS (SELECT 1 AS band_order, 'Attention' AS status_band UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS band_order, 'Insufficient' AS status_band UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS band_order, 'Good' AS status_band), dates AS (SELECT EXPLODE(SEQUENCE(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS d), actuals AS (SELECT event_date, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) AS accuracy_pct FROM workspace.meta.data_quality_checks WHERE check_category IN ('validity', 'integrity', 'referential') AND event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY event_date), actual_rows AS (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS event_date, COALESCE(actuals.accuracy_pct, 0) AS accuracy_pct, CASE WHEN COALESCE(actuals.accuracy_pct, 0) >= 99 THEN 'Good' WHEN COALESCE(actuals.accuracy_pct, 0) >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS status_band, 10 AS row_group FROM dates LEFT JOIN actuals ON actuals.event_date = DATE_FORMAT(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd')), seed_rows AS (SELECT NULL AS event_date, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS accuracy_pct, status_band, band_order AS row_group FROM band_domain) SELECT event_date, accuracy_pct, status_band FROM seed_rows UNION ALL SELECT event_date, accuracy_pct, status_band FROM actual_rows

datasets.name: ds_p3_completeness_trend
queryLines: WITH band_domain AS (SELECT 1 AS band_order, 'Attention' AS status_band UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS band_order, 'Insufficient' AS status_band UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS band_order, 'Good' AS status_band), dates AS (SELECT EXPLODE(SEQUENCE(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS d), actuals AS (SELECT event_date, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN check_status = 'PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN check_status IN ('PASS', 'FAIL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1), 0) AS completeness_pct FROM workspace.meta.data_quality_checks WHERE check_category = 'completeness' AND event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY event_date), actual_rows AS (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS event_date, COALESCE(actuals.completeness_pct, 0) AS completeness_pct, CASE WHEN COALESCE(actuals.completeness_pct, 0) >= 99 THEN 'Good' WHEN COALESCE(actuals.completeness_pct, 0) >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS status_band, 10 AS row_group FROM dates LEFT JOIN actuals ON actuals.event_date = DATE_FORMAT(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd')), seed_rows AS (SELECT NULL AS event_date, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS completeness_pct, status_band, band_order AS row_group FROM band_domain) SELECT event_date, completeness_pct, status_band FROM seed_rows UNION ALL SELECT event_date, completeness_pct, status_band FROM actual_rows

datasets.name: ds_p4_timeliness_trend
queryLines: WITH band_domain AS (SELECT 1 AS band_order, 'Attention' AS status_band UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS band_order, 'Insufficient' AS status_band UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS band_order, 'Good' AS status_band), dates AS (SELECT EXPLODE(SEQUENCE(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AS d), actuals AS (SELECT event_date, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN run_status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0) AS success_pct FROM workspace.meta.pipeline_runs WHERE event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY event_date), actual_rows AS (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS event_date, COALESCE(actuals.success_pct, 0) AS success_pct, CASE WHEN COALESCE(actuals.success_pct, 0) >= 99 THEN 'Good' WHEN COALESCE(actuals.success_pct, 0) >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS status_band, 10 AS row_group FROM dates LEFT JOIN actuals ON actuals.event_date = DATE_FORMAT(d, 'yyyy-MM-dd')), seed_rows AS (SELECT NULL AS event_date, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS success_pct, status_band, band_order AS row_group FROM band_domain) SELECT event_date, success_pct, status_band FROM seed_rows UNION ALL SELECT event_date, success_pct, status_band FROM actual_rows

datasets.name: ds_high_severity_open
queryLines: SELECT check_id, COALESCE(check_category, 'uncategorized') AS category, step, dataset_id, COUNT(*) AS occurrences, MAX(event_date) AS last_seen FROM workspace.meta.data_quality_checks WHERE check_status = 'FAIL' AND event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY check_id, check_category, step, dataset_id ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_lineage_coverage_by_step
queryLines: WITH band_domain AS (SELECT 1 AS band_order, 'Attention' AS band_name UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS band_order, 'Insufficient' AS band_name UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS band_order, 'Good' AS band_name), expected_steps AS (SELECT 'landing_to_raw' AS step UNION ALL SELECT 'raw_to_bronze' AS step UNION ALL SELECT 'bronze_to_silver' AS step UNION ALL SELECT 'silver_to_gold' AS step), runs AS (SELECT step, COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS total_runs FROM workspace.meta.pipeline_runs WHERE event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY step), lineage AS (SELECT step, COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS runs_with_lineage FROM workspace.meta.data_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 6), 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY step), actual_rows AS (SELECT expected_steps.step, COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) AS total_runs, COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) AS runs_with_lineage, COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) - COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) AS missing_runs, CASE WHEN COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) / runs.total_runs, 1) END AS coverage_pct, CASE WHEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) / runs.total_runs, 1) END >= 99 THEN 'Good' WHEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) / runs.total_runs, 1) END >= 95 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS coverage_band, CASE WHEN COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) - COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) = 0 THEN 'Good' WHEN COALESCE(runs.total_runs, 0) - COALESCE(lineage.runs_with_lineage, 0) <= 1 THEN 'Attention' ELSE 'Insufficient' END AS missing_band FROM expected_steps LEFT JOIN runs ON runs.step = expected_steps.step LEFT JOIN lineage ON lineage.step = expected_steps.step), seed_rows AS (SELECT NULL AS step, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS total_runs, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS runs_with_lineage, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS missing_runs, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS coverage_pct, band_name AS coverage_band, NULL AS missing_band, band_order AS row_group FROM band_domain UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS step, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS total_runs, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS runs_with_lineage, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS missing_runs, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS coverage_pct, NULL AS coverage_band, band_name AS missing_band, band_order + 10 AS row_group FROM band_domain) SELECT step, total_runs, runs_with_lineage, missing_runs, coverage_pct, coverage_band, missing_band FROM seed_rows UNION ALL SELECT step, total_runs, runs_with_lineage, missing_runs, coverage_pct, coverage_band, missing_band FROM actual_rows

frame.title: P6 Missing Lineage Runs by Step (7d)
